'''makuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumatonograph|pneumatonograph]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-k-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumatonograph|pneumatonograph]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| makuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mækizhith|mækizhith]] || [[word:mækizhij|mækizhij]] || [[word:mækizhish|mækizhish]] || [[word:mækizhi|mækizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:makukuzhuth|makukuzhuth]] || [[word:makukuzhuj|makukuzhuj]] || [[word:makukuzhush|makukuzhush]] || [[word:makukuzhu|makukuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:makuzhuth|makuzhuth]] || [[word:makuzhuj|makuzhuj]] || [[word:makuzhush|makuzhush]] || [[word:makuzhu|makuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:makufzhuth|makufzhuth]] || [[word:makufzhuj|makufzhuj]] || [[word:makufzhush|makufzhush]] || [[word:makufzhuf|makufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:makuzhuthu|makuzhuthu]] || [[word:makuzhuju|makuzhuju]] || [[word:makuzhushu|makuzhushu]] || [[word:makuzhuku|makuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:makuzhuth|makuzhuth]] || [[word:makuzhuj|makuzhuj]] || [[word:makuzhush|makuzhush]] || [[word:makuzhu|makuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:makuzhuthul|makuzhuthul]] || [[word:makuzhujul|makuzhujul]] || [[word:makuzhushul|makuzhushul]] || [[word:makuzhukul|makuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:makuzhuthuthu|makuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:makuzhujuju|makuzhujuju]] || [[word:makuzhushushu|makuzhushushu]] || [[word:makuzhuku|makuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:makuzhuthun|makuzhuthun]] || [[word:makuzhujun|makuzhujun]] || [[word:makuzhushun|makuzhushun]] || [[word:makuzhukun|makuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:makuzhuthuoro|makuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:makuzhujuoro|makuzhujuoro]] || [[word:makuzhushuoro|makuzhushuoro]] || [[word:makuzhukuoro|makuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
